## Adherence to Core Philosophy
Please check the following before submitting:
- [ ] My changes respect the "Local-First" data storage requirement (no external databases).
- [ ] My changes preserve user privacy (no precise geolocations, no tracking).
- [ ] My changes do NOT introduce algorithms (likes, recommendations, feeds).
- [ ] My changes do NOT modify the core `system_prompt.md` (which is locked for V1.0).

## Types of changes
<!-- What types of changes does your code introduce? Put an `x` in all the boxes that apply: -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Protocol optimization (Nostr Relay connections, etc.)
- [ ] Localization (Translation improvements)

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project.
- [ ] My change requires a change to the documentation.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
